title: Audit Rust lichen-link/src/schnorr.rs scalar mult / verify / CT eq
description: Locate dalek scalar ops, verify fn, ConstantTimeEq usage. Verify no secret-dependent branches or variable-time reductions. Cross-check with C impl and test vectors. Suggest any CT improvements.
close_reason: Completed: Rust impl uses dalek CT scalar mul (* ops at schnorr.rs:36,63,82,133,134) and subtle::ct_eq at line 144 for challenge comparison. from_canonical_bytes and torsion checks on public sig data only. Matches C impl and test vectors in test/vectors/schnorr48.json. Fully compliant, no fixes required.
